languages.text: "Также наш оборонительный периметр работает исправно. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}Машинные духи турелей удовлетворены{/d} и остановят любой воздушный удар".
languages.translation_comment:
Играет DL_ExaltRepairTurrets
DL_LariaPlan_counter +1
Не играет DL_LariaOnJuvennaSide

traits.locale_text: "Также наш оборонительный периметр работает исправно. Машинные духи турелей удовлетворены и остановят любой воздушный удар".
traits.speaker: LariaVoigtvir

languages.translation_comment:
Играет DL_ExaltRepairTurrets
DL_LariaPlan_counter +1
Не играет DL_LariaOnJuvennaSide

languages.text: "Also, our defensive perimeter is working as it should. The turrets' {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}machine spirits are satisfied{/d} and will stop any air strike."
languages.original_text: "Также наш оборонительный периметр работает исправно. {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}Машинные духи турелей удовлетворены{/d} и остановят любой воздушный удар".

traits.locale_text: "Also, our defensive perimeter is working as it should. The turrets' {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}machine spirits are satisfied{/d} and will stop any air strike."
"Also, our defensive perimeter is working as it should. The turrets' machine spirits are satisfied and will stop any air strike."
"Also, our defensive perimeter is working as it should. The turrets' machine spirits are satisfied and will stop any air strike."

languages.text: “此外，我们的防御体系运作正常。炮台的{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}机魂已被安抚{/d}，足以拦截任何空中打击。”
languages.original_text: "Also, our defensive perimeter is working as it should. The turrets' {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}machine spirits are satisfied{/d} and will stop any air strike."

traits.locale_text: “此外，我们的防御体系运作正常。炮台的{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}机魂已被安抚{/d}，足以拦截任何空中打击。”

languages.text: « Il est également à noter que notre périmètre de défense fonctionne comme attendu. Les {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}esprits de la machine des tourelles sont satisfaits{/d} et intercepteront toute tentative de frappe aérienne. »
languages.original_text: "Also, our defensive perimeter is working as it should. The turrets' {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}machine spirits are satisfied{/d} and will stop any air strike."

traits.locale_text: « Il est également à noter que notre périmètre de défense fonctionne comme attendu. Les {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}esprits de la machine des tourelles sont satisfaits{/d} et intercepteront toute tentative de frappe aérienne. »

languages.text: «Además, nuestro perímetro defensivo funciona adecuadamente. Los {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}espíritus máquina de las torretas están satisfechos{/d} y detendrán cualquier ataque aéreo».
languages.original_text: "Also, our defensive perimeter is working as it should. The turrets' {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}machine spirits are satisfied{/d} and will stop any air strike."

traits.locale_text: «Además, nuestro perímetro defensivo funciona adecuadamente. Los {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}espíritus máquina de las torretas están satisfechos{/d} y detendrán cualquier ataque aéreo».

languages.text: "Ayrıca savunma mevzimiz, olması gerektiği gibi işliyor. Taretlerin {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}makine ruhları memnun{/d}. Her türlü hava saldırısını durduracaklar."
languages.original_text: "Also, our defensive perimeter is working as it should. The turrets' {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}machine spirits are satisfied{/d} and will stop any air strike."

traits.locale_text: "Ayrıca savunma mevzimiz, olması gerektiği gibi işliyor. Taretlerin {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}makine ruhları memnun{/d}. Her türlü hava saldırısını durduracaklar."

languages.text: "Außerdem funktioniert unser Defensivperimeter wie er sollte. Die {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}Maschinengeister der Geschütze sind zufrieden{/d} und werden jeden Luftangriff abwehren."
languages.original_text: "Also, our defensive perimeter is working as it should. The turrets' {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}machine spirits are satisfied{/d} and will stop any air strike."

traits.locale_text: "Außerdem funktioniert unser Defensivperimeter wie er sollte. Die {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}Maschinengeister der Geschütze sind zufrieden{/d} und werden jeden Luftangriff abwehren."

languages.text: 「さらに、我々の防御陣は正常に機能している。砲塔の{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}機械霊は満足しており{/d}、空からの攻撃を止めるだろう。」
languages.original_text: "Also, our defensive perimeter is working as it should. The turrets' {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}machine spirits are satisfied{/d} and will stop any air strike."

traits.locale_text: 「さらに、我々の防御陣は正常に機能している。砲塔の{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_Exalt117RepairedTurrels}機械霊は満足しており{/d}、空からの攻撃を止めるだろう。」
